source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A 1-m^3 tank containing air at 25\circ\text{C} and 500 kPa is connected through a valve to another tank containing 4 kg of air at 60\circ\text{C} and 200 kPa. Now the valve is opened and the entire system reaches thermal equilibrium with the surroundings at 20\circ\text{C}. Assume constant specific heat at 25\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer of the process.

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: A 1-m^3 tank containing air at 25\circ\text{C} and 500 kPa is connected through a valve to another tank containing 4 kg of air at 60\circ\text{C} and 200 kPa. Now the valve is opened and the entire system reaches thermal equilibrium with the surroundings at 20\circ\text{C}. Assume constant specific heat at 25\circ\text{C}. Find the heat transfer of the process.
